title: Harris Ultimate Alum Oxide Paper Fine 4PK
description: The secret to a truly outstanding paint or varnish job lies in the final preparation. The Harris Ultimate Aluminium Oxide Fine Sandpaper is engineered to deliver that crucial last-step refinement. While medium grit removes imperfections, this fine grit is designed to lightly abrade and key your surface, ensuring ultimate paint adhesion and a silky smooth feel. It is perfect for: Keying Previous Coats: Gently abrading old paint or varnish to create the ideal foundation for the new coat. Final Wood Smoothing: Taking down the raised grain on bare wood before staining or varnishing. Refining Finishes: Smoothing minor blemishes in cured filler or primer without creating scratches. The tough Aluminium Oxide grain combined with the clog-resistant paper means you spend less time changing sheets and more time achieving that flawless, glass-smooth base.
